items.description: งานระบบสุขาภิบาล

warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees; this is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg counter-clockwise to read), sheet 13/21, paired with sheet 14/21 extracted separately as _2.json.

This is a category-level rollup sheet listing sub-categories 3.1-3.3, each printed with quantity=1 and unit='รวม' (unlike the หมวดงานสถาปัตยกรรม rollup sheet, which left quantity blank for its 'รวม' rows) - transcribed exactly as printed, not normalized to null.

Unlike the หมวดงานสถาปัตยกรรม header row (blank ลำดับที่ for 2.x sub-items), this category prints explicit ลำดับที่ values ('3.1','3.2','3.3') for every sub-category row - item_no populated accordingly.
